activity.title: Recent activity
activity.subtitle: What admins and the system did most recently

prayer.pageSubtitleGeneric: Today's five daily prayers, auto-detected for your location.
prayer.locationDenied: Location access denied. Use city search instead.
prayer.locationFailed: Couldn't get your location. Try city search.

settings.title: Prayer settings
settings.description: Choose your calculation method, juristic school, and location.

prayer.exportIcsHint: Download a 30-day calendar file you can import into Apple, Google, or Outlook calendar.
prayer.monthlySubtitle: Next 30 days for the resolved location.

users.subtitleMock: Sample data — configure Firebase Admin to see live users.
users.rolesUpdatedToast: Updated {count, plural, one {# user} other {# users}}.
users.rolesChangedToast: Role changed for {count, plural, one {# user} other {# users}}.
users.deletedToast: Deleted {count, plural, one {# user} other {# users}}.

users.deleteBulkTitle: Delete {count, plural, one {# user} other {# users}}

drawer.title: User profile
drawer.description: View activity and contributions. Manage roles and status.
drawer.activityPlaceholder: Activity timeline is coming in a later phase.
drawer.contentPlaceholder: Contributed articles, comments, and Q&A answers will appear here.
drawer.dangerZoneNote: Deleting a user removes all their data from the directory.

invite.title: Invite user
invite.description: They will receive an email invitation to join the community.

articles.subtitle: Long-form notes on Prayer Times, the Hijri calendar, Quran & Hadith primers, and Qibla.
articles.empty: No articles yet — check back soon.
articles.readingMinutes: {count, plural, one {# min read} other {# min read}}
articles.notFoundBody: This article may have been moved or unpublished.
articles.disclaimer: This article is informational and not a religious ruling. Consult a qualified scholar for personal matters. Quran and Hadith citations are linked to primary sources where given.

localeNotAvailable.title: Articles in this language are coming soon.
localeNotAvailable.body: All current articles are in English. Switch the language to English from the header to read them — translations will follow as content matures.

home.headline: Read the Quran and Sunnah.
home.tagline: A clean, fast reader for the Quran and the major Hadith collections, with Arabic alongside English, Russian, and Azerbaijani translations.

quran.title: Quran
quran.description: Browse all 114 surahs, read ayat in Arabic with your chosen translations side-by-side.

hadith.title: Hadith
hadith.description: Browse major collections — Bukhari, Muslim, Abu Dawud, Tirmidhi, Nasa'i, Ibn Majah, and more.

zakat.title: Zakat Calculator
zakat.description: Calculate your zakat al-mal across cash, savings, gold, silver, investments, and business — by mazhab.

prayerTimes.title: Prayer Times
prayerTimes.description: Today's five daily prayers anywhere in the world — auto-detected, with Hijri date and a live countdown to the next prayer.

sync.fxOnly: Currency rates updated. Set METALS_DEV_API_KEY to sync gold/silver.
sync.partial: Could not fetch any rates. Enter manually below.
sync.error: Could not fetch market data. Please try again or enter manually.

results.title: Calculation Results
results.belowNisab: Your net wealth is currently below the Nisab threshold. Zakat is not obligatory, but voluntary charity (sadaqah) is always rewarding.
results.disclaimer: * This calculator is a guide. Zakat is obligatory for those whose net wealth exceeds the Nisab for one lunar year. Please consult a scholar for complex situations.

settings.title: Calculator settings
settings.description: Choose a school of thought; nisab thresholds and jewelry rules update accordingly.
settings.mazhabHelp: Presets automatically update Nisab thresholds and jewelry exemptions according to the selected school.

events.subtitleMock: Sample data — configure Firebase Admin to manage real events.
events.noPersistTitle: Configure Firebase Admin to create events.
events.deleteDescription: This permanently deletes "{name}". This cannot be undone.

recurrence.prayerAnchorHint: Computes the start as an offset from a prayer (e.g. 5 min after Maghrib for iftar).
recurrence.offsetHint: Use negative for before, positive for after.

editor.createDescription: Add a new event to the community calendar.
editor.editDescription: Update the details of this event.
editor.titleArHint: Optional. Used for sacred or scholarly events.
editor.noPersistNote: Persistence is disabled in sample-data mode. Configure Firebase Admin to save events.
editor.noPersistToast: Cannot save: Firestore is not configured.
editor.errorTitle: Title must be at least 2 characters.
editor.errorStartsAt: Pick a start date and time.
editor.errorEndsAfterStart: End must be on or after start.
editor.errorVenue: Venue is required for in-person and hybrid events.
editor.errorMeetingUrl: Meeting URL is required for online and hybrid events.
editor.errorCapacity: Capacity must be a non-negative integer.
editor.errorOffsetMinutes: Offset must be a whole number of minutes.

eventsPublic.metaDescription: Discover Jumu'ah, lectures, iftars, halaqas, and more in your area.
eventsPublic.heading: Community events
eventsPublic.subheading: Jumu'ah, lectures, iftars, halaqas and more.
eventsPublic.locationDenied: Location access denied. Showing all events.
eventsPublic.locationUnsupported: Location not supported in this browser.
eventsPublic.featuredSubheading: What's happening in the next two weeks.

rsvp.notConfigured: RSVP requires Firebase Auth — not configured yet.

landing.title: Find a spouse, the halal way.
landing.tagline: Browse profiles of practising Muslims looking for marriage. Photos stay private until both sides express interest.
landing.expectationsBody: This space is for serious marriage intent. Treat every member's family with the dignity Allah commanded. Misuse leads to suspension.
landing.notConfigured: Firebase is not configured — sign-in won't work yet.

onboarding.title: Create your matrimonial profile
onboarding.subtitle: All fields are private until you submit and an admin approves your profile.
onboarding.completed: Profile submitted. An admin will review it shortly.
onboarding.bioPlaceholder: Share a few sentences about your faith, family, and what you're looking for.
onboarding.photosNote: Photos stay private — only people you match with can see them.
onboarding.photoStubNote: Photo upload is in preview. URLs are placeholders for now.
onboarding.errorAgeRange: Maximum age must be greater than minimum.

browse.title: Browse profiles

browse.noResults: No profiles match yet. Try widening your preferences.

profile.matchedBody: Both of you accepted. A direct conversation feature is coming soon.
profile.photosLocked: Photos appear after you both accept.
profile.rateLimitHit: Daily limit reached. You can express interest again at {resetsAt}.

inbox.title: Inbox
inbox.emptyIncoming: No one has expressed interest yet.
inbox.emptySent: You haven't expressed interest in anyone yet.

report.title: Report profile

submit.title: Submit a mosque
submit.subtitle: Help build the community map. Submissions are reviewed by our team before going live.
submit.guideline: Please add only mosques you've verified exist. Provide accurate name, address, and contact details.

validation.submitterEmailRequired: Please provide your email so we can follow up.

submit.success: Thank you — your submission is under review and will appear in the directory once approved.
submit.errorRate: You've submitted several mosques recently. Please try again later.
submit.errorTurnstile: Couldn't verify the request. Please refresh and try again.
submit.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

detail.prayerTimesNote: Adhan times are calculated; iqamah times are set by the mosque.

detail.verifiedNote: Listing details confirmed by mosque administrators.
detail.unverifiedNote: If you represent this mosque, claim the listing to manage it.
detail.reportNote: Spotted an inaccuracy? Tell us so we can fix it.
